description.ko: 네온 빛 비가 내리는 가운데, 홀로그램 자연과 산업적 쇠퇴가 뒤섞인 낭만적인 사이버펑크 도시 풍경.
description.en: A romanticized cyberpunk cityscape where holographic nature intertwines with industrial decay under a heavy neon rain.

prompt: A cinematic wide-angle shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Neon Petal District.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are overgrown with massive 3D holographic vines that bloom into #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan flowers. Heavy monsoon rain creates a kaleidoscopic distortion of light on wet metallic pavement. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through a dense, smoky volumetric atmosphere. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, 8k resolution, capturing the romantic and melancholic soul of a futuristic megacity.
